{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/terracotta/base.png
|block_health=20
|block_resistance=1
|rotation=stairs
}}



== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
Terracotta can be crafted into bricks, tiles, and walls for decorative purposes.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Stone]]
